response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior individual contributor with nearly two decades of software development experience and genuine passion for developer tooling and testing (test runners, CI/CD infrastructure, MCP code generators, testing workshops), which aligns well with the engineering-productivity focus. However, this is a Level II people-management role requiring at least 2 years of people management and 3 years of formal technical leadership, and the resume shows no evidence of managing people, running one-on-ones, setting team priorities, or leading organizational change. His mobile experience (iOS/Apple TV in 2015-2016) is dated relative to the role's mobile-ecosystem emphasis. He would be a credible candidate for a senior/staff IC role on this team, but not for the manager position as scoped.
strengths: 18+ years of software development across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Hands-on developer-tools and test-infrastructure work: test runners (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD and GitLab setup, device orchestration tooling, MCP code generators
Strong knowledge-sharing track record: Selenium courses, testing workshops, refactoring dojos, and conference talks
concerns: No formal people-management experience; role requires 2+ years managing or leading a team
No demonstrated strategic roadmap ownership or organizational-change leadership at team/org scale
Mobile-platform experience is limited and dated (2015-2016), while the role centers on a major mobile ecosystem

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and testing infrastructure background
Depth and breadth of engineering experience
